records.ety: [F. cravate, fr. Cravate a Croat, an inhabitant of Croatia, one of a body of Austrian troops, from whom, in 1636, this article of dress was adopted in France.]

defs: A neckcloth; a piece of silk, fine muslin, or other cloth, worn by men about the neck.
quotes: While his wig was combed and his cravat tied.
